description: RadioDNS publishes open technical standards for hybrid radio that connect broadcast radio services with internet-delivered metadata and visuals. It supports broadcasters, manufacturers, and developers implementing lookup, service information, and related hybrid-radio functions.
summary: radiodns.org exposes a public browser-based SI Management Tool on si.radiodns.org; no public REST, GraphQL, MCP, or first-party CLI surfaces on radiodns.org were documented.
